final_prompt.prompt:
Create an interior design illustration of an industrial-style cafe (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a "工业风格" aesthetic — references in the spirit of 1990s New York loft conversion photography, Kinfolk magazine raw-material editorial style, Tokyo 倉庫系 cafe interior design movement; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: framing is yours
Subject: must include exposed concrete walls, metal pipes/ductwork, vintage leather sofa, large windows with natural light flooding in, black-and-white photography artworks hung on walls
Scene/backdrop: must include a cafe interior setting with the above architectural and furnishing elements
Lighting/mood: needs a raw yet refined atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a direction of muted industrial tones with natural light warmth — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a surface treatment of rough concrete, aged metal, worn leather — exact grain and sheen is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default
Avoid:
